title: The One With Joey's Dirty Day

lines.text: Monica and Rachel's, erm, Chandler and Joey's, Joey is getting ready for a fishing trip and Phoebe is asking him about the fishing lures. Ross is playing with the rod, and Monica is pretty much just watching the on goings.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (holding a lure) So now, what is this now?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Guggly worm.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (laughs and picks up another lure) And this?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Glow-pop giggly jammer.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (laughs harder) You make it so funny.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (not wanting to be left out, picks up something) Hey umm, what's this?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (examining it) Ohh, a hunk of sandwich from last year. (Monica drops the sandwich)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (pretend fishing in the living room) Ohh, Geller's got one hooked! Ohh! Looks like a big one! Yeah, ohh! Ohh! (Swinging the rod back and forth) It's the classic struggle between man and-(swings the rod and knocks over a lamp.) Someone knocked over a lamp.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (going over and picking up the rod) That's all right. Hey you guys, you know what's going to be great about the fishing trip this year? When my dad gets me out in the middle of the lake and gives me that, "Joey, what are you doing with your life?" stuff. I can say, "Well, I'm doing a movie with Charlton Heston dad. What are you doing with your life?"

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Great!
Chandler enters from his bedroom, all depressed and wearing sweat pants, with the chick and duck in tow.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You don't have to stop having fun just because I'm here. Kathy didn't cheat on all of you. (To Joey) Well, except you. (They hug and Chandler goes into the bathroom with the chick and duck following him.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, Joey, I don't think that you should leave Chandler alone. I mean it's only been two days since he broke up with Kathy. Maybe you can go fishing next week?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look, there's nothing I can do for him right now, he's still in his sweat pants, that's still Phase One. Y'know? I'll be back for Phase Two, I would never miss Phase Two.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What's Phase Two?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Gettin' drunk and going to a strip club.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: How does going to a strip club help him better?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Because there are naked ladies there.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Which helps him get to Phase Three, picturing yourself with other women.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: There are naked ladies there too.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (opening the bathroom door and kicking out the chick and duck) Would you give me one minute!! Please.
Opening Credits
Bloomingdale's, Rachel is still dressing Joshua. He is trying on a pair of pants.

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: So, these will match the jacket you picked out for me last week?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Um-hmm. (Joshua turns to look in the mirror and leaves Rachel staring at his ass.) There we go. There it is.

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: (turning around) Oh! You know what I need?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Gloves. Brown, leather dress gloves.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, okay. Uhh, well let's see. (Grabs his hand.) You're about-well uh, this one is large. And this one-(Grabs the other hand.)

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Also large?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! Okay, two larges coming right up!

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Mr. Waltham
lines.text: (entering) Rachel! Could I have a moment?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Mr. Waltham
lines.text: I-I was wondering, my niece you see is in from London-well Shropshire really but y'know-well she's about your age I say. Anyway I have tickets for the opera, Die Fledermaus, and I was wondering if you'd like to keep her company this evening?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Sure. You got it. Great!

lines.speaker: Mr. Waltham
lines.text: Oh, good.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Me, Fledermaus, great. I really-(motions to Joshua.)

lines.speaker: Mr. Waltham
lines.text: Ohh! Yes of course, thank you, thank you, thank you so very much.

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: So...(Holds out his hands as to say, "Where are my gloves?")

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So? (She puts her hands in his, totally forgetting about the gloves, and hoping for something more intimate.)

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Gloves?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! Right! Right, sorry, I'll be right back!

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Uhh, actually y'know what, I kinda-I have to take off.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: But, I was curious; do you have any plans for tonight?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! Nothing!

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: I invested in this night-club and it's opening tonight, would you like to come?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah! That would be great!

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: You're into hardcore S&M right?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (shocked) Well, I-I guess-I...

lines.speaker: Joshua
lines.text: Kidding! (Rachel is relived) I'm gonna get there early, but I'm going to put you on the V.I.P list, okay? Look for me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, great, you betcha!

lines.speaker: Mr. Waltham
lines.text: (entering) I almost forget the tickets, didn't I?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Mr. Waltham
lines.text: For you and Emily, tonight, Die Fledermaus.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh. Oh, right.

lines.speaker: Mr. Waltham
lines.text: I think you'll like it, it has two out of the three tenors.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yay!
Monica and Rachel's, erm, Chandler and Joey's, Chandler is in his sweats flinging playing cards into a pot.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know, I can't believe Kathy did this too me. I really, thought that she was the one. I tell you what, from now on I'm never getting out of this chair, ever! Okay? From now on, this chair is the one! You wanna what else is the one? My sweat pants!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on, man! Just-just take the sweats off. Okay? Just take 'em off and we'll have some fun.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey-hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Catch any big fish? (Phoebe, Ross, and Monica all go over to him.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh my God, you guys have no idea.

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: (they all recoil from the smell emanating from him) Oh! God! Wow!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You stink!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Are you kidding?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, three days on the lake without a shower. Plus! I fell in that big tub of worms at the bait stand! Hey, how-how's he doing?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: He hasn't gotten out of that chair in two days.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (goes over to Chandler) Hey buddy! How's it going?
Chandler imitates retching and gets out of the chair.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To the rest of the gang) Hey, see that? He just needed his pal to come home. All right, uh, I've got to go memorise my lines. (Starts to go his bedroom) Me and Charlton Heston bright and early tomorrow morning! Yeah-yeah!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, Monica!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Uh-oh, what's the matter?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, it's Joshua invited me to this fancy club opening tonight. But, I already told Mr. Waltham that I would take his niece to this dumb old opera. So... What are you gonna do?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I don't know sweetie.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! Help me!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can't! I have to work!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I would, but I get my morning sickness in the evening.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ugh!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Unless! She wants to spend the night holding my hair back for me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, gosh. You guys, come on, this is-I have to meet Joshua! This is my one chance for him to see the fun Rachel. Y'know the "Wouldn't it be great if she was my wife" Rachel. Ohh, all right! Are Joey and Chandler back?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, Chandler's still in Phase One, and Joey's that thing you smell.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! (Realises that Ross is in the room.) Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohhhh, come on!!!
There's a knock on the door.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I think she's here.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! Wait! Wait-wait! Ross, please!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You want me to take some girl I've never met to the opera so you can go to a club and flirt with some guy, hmm, that-that is a toughie.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (looking out the peephole) Ohh, she's looking down the hall. Oh! She looked right at me! Oh wait, you can't see people through that little hole, can you? (Goes back to the door.) Hello!

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: Hello! (Monica screams)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'll be right there! (to Ross) Okay, Ross, please come on! I thought we have moved on! I thought we've gotten to a place where we could be happy for each other! I mean was that just me?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right, I'll do it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh thank you! Thank you, thank you, thank you! (Monica opens the door.) Emily?

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm Rachel Green.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Thank goodness.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: There's been a teeny-teeny change in plans. It turns out that I'm not free tonight. So...

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Really?! Well, that's just lovely, isn't it? I must've missed your call, even though I didn't leave the flat all day.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh well, no I...

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Oh, no-no-no, that's not rude! It's perfectly in keeping with a trip that I've already been run down by one of your wiener carts, and been strip-searched at John F. Kennedy Airport, apparently to you people, I look like someone who's got a balloon full of cocaine stuffed up their bum.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I-I-I think you look great.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: Good night, it was very nice to meet you all. (Storms out.)
Pause

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'll get her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Please hurry.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Don't you just love the way they talk?!
Monica and Rachel's, erm, Chandler and Joey's, the next morning, Monica and Phoebe are eating breakfast.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It kicked! I think the baby kicked!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh no wait, oh no, the elastic on my underwear busted.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (running from his bedroom) Oh my God! I overslept! I was supposed to be on the set a half an hour ago! I gotta get out of here!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh wait, Joey, you can't go like that! You stink!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look, I know I feel asleep before I could shower and now I don't have time! They're just ten blocks away, if I run, I can make it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah. Run ten blocks, that'll help the smell.
He opens the door to reveal Rachel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey-whoa, slow down. (Gets a whiff of him) No, keep moving. (Joey runs off.) Wow!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So? How did it go with Joshua last night?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I didn't see Joshua last night, but I did punch a girl in the face.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: The whole night was horrible, it was pouring down rain, and when I got there, there was no Rachel Green on the list, but there was a Rachel Greep.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh! So, did you get to meet her?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, there is no Rachel Greep, but then this other girl overheard us and she was all, "I'm Rachel Greep! I'm Rachel Greep!" and he let her right in.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So you hit her in the face?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, she was already in, but then this big bitch behind me tried to steal my umbrella, so I clocked her. Ohhh! I can't believe this, all I wanted was a few hours outside of work to see Joshua, so he can go ahead and start falling in love with me.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (going over to comfort her) Aww, Pheebs.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Honey, that's you're name.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That's short for Phoebe?! I thought that was just what we called each other!
Chandler enters from his bedroom.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! You're wearing pants!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's right! Where are the guys? I'm ready to get drunk and see some strippers.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's 9:30 in the morning!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: They got a breakfast buffet.
The phone rings and Monica answers it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hello. (Listens) Oh, hey Ross!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ooh, let me talk to him!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh-oh, my God!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, can I just...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (to Chandler) Shh!! (On phone) Wait, what?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She's shhing me! It's my phone and she's shhing me!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Shhh!! Please! What's he saying?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He's with Emily at a Bed and Breakfast in Vermont!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What? Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? Who the hell is Emily-(realises) noooo!!
Commercial Break
Chandler and Joey's, erm, Monica and Rachel's, scene continued from earlier.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: They're in Vermont!! How could this happen?! (She waves her arms franticly and hits Chandler.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ow!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: How-how did end up in Vermont with that awful witch?! (She hits Chandler again.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Maybe, she doesn't hit him all the time.
[cut to Ross in Vermont, talking on the phone.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: When we first met her, she was soaking, her feet were wet! Who wouldn't be miserable? I'm telling you when I got her into a dry pair of shoes, she was a totally different person.

lines.speaker: Emily
lines.text: (rushing in) Ross! Come quickly! There's a deer just outside eating fruit from the orchard!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I've gotta go, there's a deer just outside eating fruit from the orchard! (He hangs up and runs out.)
[cut back to Chandler and Joey's.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He had to go, there's a deer just outside eating fruit from the orchard.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't get this! She was horrible! (She hits Chandler, yet again.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, I'm going to go stand over there. (Points and moves into the living room.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why do you care so much anyway?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't care! All right, y'know what I'm just upset that I'm getting nowhere with Joshua that-y'know what still, you do not meet someone and go flitting off to Vermont!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, when you first met Barry, you flitted off to Vail.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, y'know, would you just for once, not remember every...little...thing!! (Storms out.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So y'know, uh, when's he getting back?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: A couple of days.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know, I knew something like this was going to happen. (He starts to take off his pants, revealing that he is still wearing his sweat pants.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you doing?! Chandler! You can't just go back a phase!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes you can. You're thinking about time, you can't go back in time.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, look, why don't you just, why don't you do your Phase Two strip club thing with us.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, come on, we can be guys!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (laughs) No you can't.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Come on! Let us be guys! Maybe we want to be guys!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You don't want to be guys, you'd be all hairy and wouldn't live as long. (Starts to go to his bedroom)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Y'know you, you just stop being such a wuss and get those off and you come with us and watch naked girls dance around!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. (Starts to cry)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm sorry. (Goes and hugs him)
Silvercup Studios, Joey is just arriving for his scene.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (rushing in) Hey! Joey Tribbiani! I'm here! I'm here!

lines.speaker: The A.D
lines.text: Calm down, we got time, we're running a little late.
Just then, Charlton Heston walks out of his dressing room and starts eating a liquorice whip.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look at that, Charlton Heston eating a liquorice whip!

lines.speaker: The A.D
lines.text: Yeah, we loves 'em. I've never seen him with-(He gets a whiff of Joey and starts smelling around.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (trying to act like he's not the one that stinks.) Whoa! Yeah, what the hell is that? What smells so bad?

lines.speaker: The A.D
lines.text: You.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know, I can see why you think that, but ah, actually, you know who I think it is?

lines.speaker: The A.D
lines.text: You?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No-no, it's uh, it's Heston.

lines.speaker: The A.D
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, the man wreaks! Smells like he went on a three day fishing trip and then ate some liquorice.

lines.speaker: The A.D
lines.text: There's no way he smells, he's the only one around here with a shower in his dressing room.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really, a shower huh? And uh, which-which room might that be?

lines.speaker: The A.D
lines.text: The one with "Heston" on it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Interesting.
A strip club, the girls are there with Chandler, who isn't enjoying himself.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (coming back to the stage and sitting next to Chandler) Okay, I've got some Ones, you wanna put them in her panties?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No thanks, Mom!
A man sits down next to Phoebe and lights up a cigarette.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, no umm, hi, that-that, you have to put that out, 'cause I'm pregnant.

lines.speaker: The Cigarette Smoking Guy
lines.text: (No, not the Cigarette Smoking Man from The X-Files.) Well, maybe you and your baby should go to another strip club.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ha-ha, it's not my baby, ha-ha-ha! (He leaves.)
The dancer finishes and everyone claps.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Very good, (getting up and sliding a One into the dancer's hot pants) so good.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (doing the same) I really, really enjoyed it. Very exotic.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (joining them) Well, I just checked our messages and Joshua didn't call. I mean you'd think he'd be worried about me not showing up at his club. Ugh, you know what makes it so much worse, Ross is all happy in Vermont!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Come on! Look where you are!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (to the waitress) When you get a sec, another round of daiquiris.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Remember, a virgin for me please.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh! And don't let me leave without getting the name of that carpet guy.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ahh, come on! Y'know what-y'know what, I think I'm just gonna go home and call Kathy.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, if you think it will help.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No! That was a test! In a couple of hours I'm gonna get really drunk and wanna call Kathy and you guys are gonna have to stop me! And then after that, I'm gonna get so drunk, I'm gonna wanna call Janice

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You should! How is she?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ohhh!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I think somebody needs another lap dance. (Motions for one.)
Silvercup studios, Joey is taking a shower in Charlton Heston's dressing room. Heston enters the room, Joey panics, and walks over to the shower and confronts Joey about the use of his shower.

lines.speaker: Charlton Heston
lines.text: Hello! Who's in there? (He opens to curtain to reveal a naked and wet Joey.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: How ya doin'?

lines.speaker: Charlton Heston
lines.text: Who in the hell are you?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I guess you wouldn't believe me if I said I was Kurt Douglas, huh?

lines.speaker: Charlton Heston
lines.text: Put some pants on kid so I can kick your butt.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No-no-no, no, no, wait. You see, I'm an actor, Joey Tribbiani, I'm doing a scene with you today, and well, I stink.

lines.speaker: Charlton Heston
lines.text: (shocked) You're in this picture?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah-yeah, I'm one of the cops that won't work with you 'cause you a lose cannon. Anyway, look, I'm really sorry, but I stink!

lines.speaker: Charlton Heston
lines.text: Joey, right?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Charlton Heston
lines.text: (tosses him a towel, motions for him to get out of the shower and sits down on the couch) Every actor at one time or another-opp! (Joey tries to sit down next to him and Heston makes him sit somewhere else.) Every actor thinks he stinks, even Lawrence Oliver at sometimes thought he stank, Bob Redford won't even watch himself.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh no-no-no, you don't understand...

lines.speaker: Charlton Heston
lines.text: Listen to me!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah, yeah.

lines.speaker: Charlton Heston
lines.text: I don't know one actor worth his salt that didn't say at one time or another, "God, I stink!" Hell, I just did a scene out there, first take, I stunk the place up. But, the important thing you must remember, no matter how badly you think you might stink, you must never, ever bust into my dressing room and use my shower! Do you understand me?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes sir! Yes sir, I'm-I'm-(he starts to leave)

lines.speaker: Charlton Heston
lines.text: Wait a minute! Take your pants.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. Oh, yeah.
Chandler and Joey's, erm, Monica and Rachel's, Chandler, Monica, and Phoebe are returning from the strip club.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So, we did okay at the strip club, right?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yeah, that was great. Thanks to you, the hottest cocktail waitress there is quitting to teach the third grade!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering) I can't believe it! He still hasn't called.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Who, Josh?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: It's Joshua.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What, he doesn't like Josh?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, I don't.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, well I'm gonna put my sweats back on.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh no! Wait! Wait! Okay, y'know what, you were right, you were right. We really weren't great at being guys, but you know why? Because we're girls.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: And do you know what girls are really good at?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Stripping!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, listening! Sit! Y'know, maybe it would just really, really help if you would just talk.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, come on! What's going in on in there? (Pats his chest.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah. And y'know, if you wanna cry, that's okay too.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, look, I'm gonna have to ask you all to leave.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Come on! Chandler!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look, forget it. We tried, but Phase Three is a lost cause, Okay? Those strippers were insanely hot, and I couldn't picture myself with any of them. (Sits back in disgust.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: They really were pretty, weren't they? (Rachel and Phoebe both agree)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I really liked that fighter pilot one.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, Candy! She was so spunky!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y'know, I think if I were going to be with a woman. (Chandler is intrigued.) It'd, it'd be with someone like Michelle, she was so oh, she was so petite.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: See, I don't know, for me it would have to Chantal.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, Chantal!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my goodness, she had the smoothest skin! I mean when I stuck that dollar bill in her g-string and grazed her thigh...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (jumping up) Phase Three! I just achieved Phase Three!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I am totally picturing you with all those women!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's-that's not Phase Three.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I'm there too!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, are we all together? Like in a group?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Stop it! You're killing me! I think I just moved on to Phase Four!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! What is that? What is that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Where I don't want to have a relationship ever! I just want to have sex with strippers and my friends!!
Central Perk, the gang is there, minus Ross. Chandler is trying to cheer Joey up about missing Phase Two.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Come on, let me see that smile.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't wanna.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Please?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I wanted to go to the strip club!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know, I know, but you're gonna have plenty of chances. There are literally thousands of women out there just waiting to screw me over.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, all right. (Ross enters.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey-ooh so, how was Vermont?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Emily is...incredible. I mean there-there are no words to describe it, I mean the whole weekend was like a dream. (Sees Rachel coming back from the bathroom.) Oh! And you! Rach!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey! You were so right!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh, what you said, about us being in a place where we could finally be happy for each other.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, hmm.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I mean, I, I-I admit I-I wasn't quite there. Y'know, I mean the thought of you and that-that Josh guy...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joshua.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joshua...guy at that club, dancing and having a good time, the thought of it kinda...y'know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, I...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: But now! I'm there! I'm totally there! I'm-I'm finally where you are!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, thank goodness!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, and-and thank you for Emily.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, no problem. I'm so glad I could help. Happy for you. (She playfully punches him.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Happy for you. (He punches her back.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, happy for you! (Hits him harder.)
Closing Credits

Chandler and Joey's, erm, Monica and Rachel's, Chandler is there and is getting ready to direct a bunch of strippers, Monica, Rachel, and Phoebe on what to do in the upcoming orgy of lesbian lust. Yes, it's a dream sequence, this isn't cable.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right ladies, here's what we're gonna do. (Points to a stripper.) You are gonna take off my clothes. (To another two strippers) You two, go get the oils. (To another stripper) And you just constantly scream at the top of your voice, "Chandler's the king! Chandler's the king!"

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I-I wanna be with her, (points to the stripper next to her) I like her.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, that's fine! Go with your instincts, go with your instincts.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait, now, what am I doing again?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Come on! Would you please pay attention, I could wake up at any moment!

lines.speaker: The Cigarette Guy
lines.text: Hi, I'm Joshua, I'm here to pick up Rachel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No-no-no, that' not Joshua.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What do you want from me, I've never met the guy. So anyway, Rachel, I'm sorry you can't stay, (Rachel is upset about leaving the orgy with the cigarette guy.) but the rest of us have a lot of work to do. (The cigarette guy starts rubbing Chandler's back.) What are you doing? (The guy just nods) All right, listen, I've got to wake up!
End
